settings.html:
<style>

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: #0d1117; color: #fff; line-height: 1.6; }

/* ═══ NAVBAR (idéntico al resto) ═══ */
.navbar { background: #0b1117; width: 100%; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; }
.navbar-top {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
  align-items: center; padding: 24px 48px 22px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
.navbar-socials { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 18px; justify-content: flex-end; }
.navbar-socials a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; display: flex; }
.navbar-socials a:hover { color: #fff; }
.navbar-logo { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px; text-decoration: none; justify-self: center; }
.logo-main { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; }
.logo-wordmark { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: 32px; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #ffffff; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1; }
.logo-wordmark span { color: #1a6dc7; }
.logo-sub { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.4em; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); text-transform: uppercase; text-align: center; }
.navbar-bottom { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 44px; padding: 16px 48px; position: relative; }
.nav-link { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.13em; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; padding-bottom: 2px; position: relative; }
.nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: #1a3875; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform 0.25s; }
.nav-link:hover { color: #fff; }
.nav-link:hover::after, .nav-link.active::after { transform: scaleX(1); }
.nav-link.active { color: #fff; }
.nav-cta { position: absolute; right: 48px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.13em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #fff; text-decoration: none; background: #e8420a; padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 3px; transition: background 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; }
.nav-cta:hover { background: #c73508; }

/* ═══ BREADCRUMB ═══ */
.breadcrumb { padding: 14px 80px; background: #060a10; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
.breadcrumb a, .breadcrumb span { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; }
.breadcrumb a { color: #1a6dc7; text-decoration: none; }
.breadcrumb span { color: rgba(255,255,255,.4); }
.breadcrumb-sep { color: rgba(255,255,255,.2); }

/* ═══ HERO ═══ */
.hero { position: relative; min-height: 70vh; display: flex; align-items: center; overflow: hidden; }
.hero-bg {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
  background-size: cover; background-position: center;
}
.hero-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(105deg, rgba(5,8,18,.97) 0%, rgba(5,8,18,.85) 45%, rgba(5,8,18,.4) 75%, rgba(5,8,18,.1) 100%);
}
.hero-inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; padding: 100px 80px; max-width: 800px; }
.hero-badge {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  background: rgba(232,66,10,.12); border: 1px solid rgba(232,66,10,.3);
  border-radius: 20px; padding: 6px 16px; margin-bottom: 28px;
}
.hero-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #e8420a; }
.hero-badge-text { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #e8420a; }
.hero h1 {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(40px, 6vw, 78px);
  font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -3px; line-height: .98;
  color: #fff; margin-bottom: 28px;
}
.hero h1 em { font-style: normal; color: #e8420a; }
.hero h1 span { color: #1a6dc7; }
.hero-sub {
  font-size: 19px; font-weight: 300;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.65); line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 600px; margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.hero-sub strong { color: #fff; font-weight: 600; }
.hero-tagline {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600; font-style: italic; color: rgba(255,255,255,.45);
  letter-spacing: .02em;
}

/* ═══ FORMULARIO + CANALES (sección principal) ═══ */
.contact-main { background: #060a10; padding: 100px 80px; }
.contact-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;
  gap: 64px; max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Columna formulario */
.form-block {}
.form-eyebrow {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .22em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #e8420a; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.form-eyebrow::before { content: ''; display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: #e8420a; }
.form-title {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(32px, 4vw, 48px);
  font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -1.5px; line-height: 1.05;
  color: #fff; margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.form-title em { font-style: normal; color: #1a6dc7; }
.form-sub {
  font-size: 16px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.55);
  line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 40px; max-width: 540px;
}

.contact-form {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius: 16px; padding: 40px 36px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}
.field-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }
.field { margin-bottom: 18px; }
.field label {
  display: block; margin-bottom: 8px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.55);
}
.field input, .field select, .field textarea {
  width: 100%; padding: 14px 16px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #fff; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 15px;
  transition: all .2s;
}
.field input::placeholder, .field textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,.3); }
.field input:focus, .field select:focus, .field textarea:focus {
  outline: none; border-color: #e8420a;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(232,66,10,.1);
}
.field select option { background: #0d1117; color: #fff; }
.field textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 110px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }

.privacy-row {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px;
  margin: 8px 0 24px;
  font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.5); line-height: 1.6;
}
.privacy-row input {
  width: 16px; height: 16px; margin-top: 2px;
  accent-color: #e8420a; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.privacy-row a { color: #1a6dc7; text-decoration: none; }
.privacy-row a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

.submit-btn {
  width: 100%; background: #e8420a; color: #fff;
  padding: 20px 36px; border: none; border-radius: 6px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase;
  cursor: pointer; transition: all .2s;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(232,66,10,.25);
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px;
}
.submit-btn:hover {
  background: #c73508; transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(232,66,10,.35);
}
.submit-btn:disabled {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.1); color: rgba(255,255,255,.4);
  cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none;
}
.form-message {
  margin-top: 18px; padding: 14px 18px; border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 14px; display: none;
}
.form-message.success { background: rgba(34,197,94,.15); color: #4ade80; border: 1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.3); display: block; }
.form-message.error { background: rgba(220,38,38,.15); color: #f87171; border: 1px solid rgba(220,38,38,.3); display: block; }

/* Columna canales directos */
.channels { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px; }
.channel-card {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.03);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px;
  text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
  transition: all .25s; display: block; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.channel-card::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0;
  width: 100%; height: 3px;
  transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left;
  transition: transform .3s;
}
.channel-card:hover {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.16);
  transform: translateY(-3px);
}
.channel-card.wapp::before { background: #25d366; }
.channel-card.email::before { background: #1a6dc7; }
.channel-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }

.channel-icon {
  width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 14px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 28px;
}
.channel-icon.wapp { background: rgba(37,211,102,.15); color: #25d366; }
.channel-icon.email { background: rgba(26,109,199,.15); color: #1a6dc7; }
.channel-eyebrow {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.4); margin-bottom: 8px; display: block;
}
.channel-title {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -.5px;
  color: #fff; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.channel-desc {
  font-size: 14px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.55);
  line-height: 1.65; margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.channel-link {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .08em;
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
}
.channel-card.wapp .channel-link { color: #25d366; }
.channel-card.email .channel-link { color: #1a6dc7; }

.hours-box {
  background: rgba(232,66,10,.06);
  border: 1px solid rgba(232,66,10,.18);
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 22px 24px;
}
.hours-title {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #e8420a; margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.hours-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; }
.hours-list li {
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 6px 0; font-size: 13px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);
}
.hours-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.hours-list .day { color: rgba(255,255,255,.7); font-weight: 500; }
.hours-list .time { color: rgba(255,255,255,.5); font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }

/* ═══ STRIP de confianza ═══ */
.trust-strip {
  background: #0d1117;
  padding: 60px 80px;
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  text-align: center;
}
.trust-title {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(20px, 2.5vw, 28px);
  font-weight: 800; color: #fff;
  letter-spacing: -.5px; margin-bottom: 32px;
}
.trust-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 32px; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;
}
.trust-item { text-align: center; }
.trust-num {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(28px, 4vw, 44px);
  font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -1.5px;
  color: #1a6dc7; line-height: 1;
}
.trust-num em { font-style: normal; color: #e8420a; }
.trust-label {
  margin-top: 12px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.45);
}

/* ═══ CTA final ═══ */
.final-cta {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #e8420a 0%, #c73508 100%);
  padding: 80px 80px; text-align: center;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.final-cta::before {
  content: 'LOGISPARK'; position: absolute;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 240px;
  font-weight: 900; color: rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  letter-spacing: -10px; top: 50%; left: 50%;
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%); white-space: nowrap;
  pointer-events: none;
}
.final-cta-inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; }
.final-cta h2 {
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(32px, 4.5vw, 56px);
  font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: -2px; line-height: 1.05;
  color: #fff; margin-bottom: 18px;
}
.final-cta p {
  font-size: 17px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.85);
  line-height: 1.7; margin-bottom: 36px;
}
.final-cta a {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  background: #fff; color: #e8420a;
  padding: 22px 44px; border-radius: 6px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase;
  text-decoration: none; transition: all .2s;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.2);
}
.final-cta a:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
}

/* ═══ FOOTER ═══ */
.footer { background: #060a10; padding: 32px 80px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 16px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04); }
.footer p { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,.3); letter-spacing: .03em; }

/* ═══ RESPONSIVE ═══ */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .contact-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; }
  .trust-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .hero-inner { padding: 80px 40px; }
  .contact-main, .trust-strip, .final-cta, .footer { padding-left: 40px; padding-right: 40px; }
  .breadcrumb { padding-left: 40px; padding-right: 40px; }
  .navbar-top, .navbar-bottom { padding-left: 32px; padding-right: 32px; }
  .nav-cta { right: 32px; }
}
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .field-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
  .navbar-bottom { gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap; padding: 14px 16px; }
  .nav-cta { position: relative; right: auto; top: auto; transform: none; }
  .contact-form { padding: 28px 22px; }
  .hero-inner { padding: 64px 24px; }
  .contact-main, .trust-strip, .final-cta { padding: 60px 24px; }
  .footer { padding: 24px; text-align: center; justify-content: center; }
}

</style>



<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav class="navbar">
  <div class="navbar-top">
    <div></div>
    <a class="navbar-logo" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/">
      <div class="logo-main">
        <svg width="44" height="44" viewBox="0 0 120 120" fill="none">
          <rect width="120" height="120" rx="22" fill="#1a3875"/>
          <path d="M60 18 L88 33 L88 65 L60 50 Z" fill="white" opacity=".95"/>
          <path d="M32 33 L60 18 L60 50 L32 65 Z" fill="white" opacity=".75"/>
          <path d="M32 65 L60 50 L88 65 L60 80 Z" fill="white" opacity=".5"/>
          <circle cx="84" cy="52" r="16" fill="#e8420a"/>
          <circle cx="84" cy="48.5" r="6.5" fill="white"/>
          <path d="M84 55 Q78 68 84 72 Q90 68 84 55Z" fill="#e8420a"/>
        </svg>
        <div class="logo-wordmark">LOGISPARK <span>GROUP</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="logo-sub">Smart Logistics Solutions</div>
    </a>
    <div class="navbar-socials">
      <a href="#" aria-label="LinkedIn"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-4 0v7H10v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6zM2 9h4v12H2z"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/></svg></a>
      <a href="#" aria-label="Instagram"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></svg></a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="navbar-bottom">
    <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/">Inicio</a>
  <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/almacenamiento-exterior/">Almacenamiento Exterior</a>
  <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/nave-industrial/">Nave Industrial</a>
  <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/parques-trasteros/">Parques de Trasteros</a>
  <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/logikey/">LogiKey™</a>
  <a class="nav-link active" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/contacto/">Contacto</a>
    <a class="nav-cta" href="#contact-form">Hablemos →</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- BREADCRUMB -->
<div class="breadcrumb">
  <a href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/">Inicio</a>
  <span class="breadcrumb-sep">›</span>
  <span>Contacto</span>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-badge">
      <div class="hero-badge-dot"></div>
      <span class="hero-badge-text">Respuesta en menos de 24 horas</span>
    </div>
    <h1>Tu <em>solución</em><br>logística<br><span>empieza aquí.</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Cuéntanos qué necesitas — volumen, tipo de mercancía, zona y plazos. <strong>Te respondemos hoy mismo con una propuesta concreta.</strong></p>
    <p class="hero-tagline">— Sin compromiso. Sin letra pequeña. Sin pérdidas de tiempo.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FORMULARIO + CANALES -->
<section class="contact-main" id="contact-form">
  <div class="contact-grid">

    <!-- COLUMNA FORMULARIO -->
    <div class="form-block">
      <div class="form-eyebrow">Formulario directo</div>
      <h2 class="form-title">Cuéntanos qué <em>necesitas</em>.</h2>
      <p class="form-sub">Recibimos tu mensaje al instante en <strong style="color:#fff;">hola@logispark.es</strong>. Lo lee una persona, no un bot. Te respondemos en horas, no en días.</p>

      <form class="contact-form" id="logispark-form" novalidate>
        <div class="field-row">
          <div class="field">
            <label for="nombre">Tu nombre *</label>
            <input type="text" id="nombre" name="nombre" required placeholder="Ej. Carlos Martínez">
          </div>
          <div class="field">
            <label for="empresa">Empresa *</label>
            <input type="text" id="empresa" name="empresa" required placeholder="Ej. Logística XYZ">
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label for="email">Email *</label>
          <input type="email" id="email" name="email" required placeholder="tunombre@empresa.com">
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label for="servicio">¿Qué te interesa?</label>
          <select id="servicio" name="servicio">
            <option value="Almacenamiento Exterior">📦 Almacenamiento Exterior</option>
            <option value="Nave Industrial">🏭 Nave Industrial (IFS)</option>
            <option value="Parques de Trasteros">🧱 Parques de Trasteros</option>
            <option value="LogiKey">🔑 LogiKey™ — Intermediación logística</option>
            <option value="Mystery Shipper">🕵️ Mystery Shipper (premium)</option>
            <option value="Consulta general">💬 Consulta general</option>
          </select>
        </div>

        <div class="field">
          <label for="mensaje">Cuéntanos *</label>
          <textarea id="mensaje" name="mensaje" required placeholder="Volumen, urgencia, tipo de mercancía... Cualquier detalle nos ayuda a darte una propuesta más afinada."></textarea>
        </div>

        <div class="privacy-row">
          <input type="checkbox" id="privacy" required>
          <label for="privacy">Acepto la <a href="#">política de privacidad</a> y autorizo el contacto comercial. Tus datos solo los usamos para responderte.</label>
        </div>

        <button type="submit" class="submit-btn" id="submit-btn">
          Enviar mensaje →
        </button>

        <div class="form-message" id="form-message"></div>
      </form>
    </div>

    <!-- COLUMNA CANALES DIRECTOS -->
    <div class="channels">

      <div class="form-eyebrow">O contáctanos directo</div>

      <a href="https://wa.me/34663311407?text=Hola%2C%20me%20interesa%20m%C3%A1s%20informaci%C3%B3n%20sobre%20vuestros%20servicios%20log%C3%ADsticos.%20Mi%20empresa%20es..." target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="channel-card wapp">
        <div class="channel-icon wapp">

<script>

const form = document.getElementById('logispark-form');
const submitBtn = document.getElementById('submit-btn');
const messageBox = document.getElementById('form-message');

form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault();

  // Validación
  const nombre = document.getElementById('nombre').value.trim();
  const empresa = document.getElementById('empresa').value.trim();
  const email = document.getElementById('email').value.trim();
  const mensaje = document.getElementById('mensaje').value.trim();
  const privacy = document.getElementById('privacy').checked;
  const servicio = document.getElementById('servicio').value;

  if (!nombre || !empresa || !email || !mensaje) {
    messageBox.className = 'form-message error';
    messageBox.textContent = '⚠ Por favor, completa todos los campos obligatorios.';
    return;
  }
  if (!privacy) {
    messageBox.className = 'form-message error';
    messageBox.textContent = '⚠ Debes aceptar la política de privacidad para enviar el mensaje.';
    return;
  }

  /* En esta versión preview (HTML standalone), abrimos cliente de email con
     todo precargado a hola@logispark.es. En el WordPress real, el JS llama
     a admin-ajax.php que envía con wp_mail() directamente.
  */
  const subject = encodeURIComponent('[Web] Contacto: ' + servicio + ' — ' + empresa);
  const body = encodeURIComponent(
    'Nuevo contacto desde la web:\n\n' +
    'Nombre: ' + nombre + '\n' +
    'Empresa: ' + empresa + '\n' +
    'Email: ' + email + '\n' +
    'Servicio: ' + servicio + '\n\n' +
    'Mensaje:\n' + mensaje
  );

  submitBtn.disabled = true;
  submitBtn.textContent = 'Enviando...';

  window.location.href = 'mailto:hola@logispark.es?subject=' + subject + '&body=' + body;

  setTimeout(function() {
    messageBox.className = 'form-message success';
    messageBox.textContent = '✓ ¡Perfecto! Se ha abierto tu cliente de email con el mensaje precargado. Si no se ha abierto, escríbenos directamente a hola@logispark.es';
    submitBtn.disabled = false;
    submitBtn.textContent = 'Enviar mensaje →';
  }, 1000);
});

</script>

<!-- WHATSAPP FAB FLOTANTE (en todas las páginas) -->
<style>
#wa-fab-global {
  position: fixed; bottom: 28px; right: 28px;
  z-index: 9999;
  width: 64px; height: 64px;
  background: #25d366;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(37,211,102,.4);
  cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none;
  transition: transform .25s, box-shadow .25s;
  animation: wa-pulse-anim 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}
#wa-fab-global:hover {
  transform: scale(1.08);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(37,211,102,.5);
}
#wa-fab-global svg { width: 32px; height: 32px; color: #fff; }
@keyframes wa-pulse-anim {
  0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(37,211,102,.4), 0 0 0 0 rgba(37,211,102,.5); }
  50% { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(37,211,102,.4), 0 0 0 14px rgba(37,211,102,0); }
}
#wa-fab-global .wa-tip-global {
  position: absolute; right: 76px; top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  background: #0d1117; color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 6px;
  white-space: nowrap; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
  transition: opacity .25s, transform .25s;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
}
#wa-fab-global .wa-tip-global::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; right: -6px; top: 50%;
  transform: translateY(-50%);
  border-left: 6px solid #0d1117;
  border-top: 6px solid transparent;
  border-bottom: 6px solid transparent;
}
#wa-fab-global:hover .wa-tip-global {
  opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-50%) translateX(-4px);
}
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  #wa-fab-global { width: 56px; height: 56px; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; }
  #wa-fab-global svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; }
  #wa-fab-global .wa-tip-global { display: none; }
}
</style>
